name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy Shahiwal cow suitable for Qurbani. Well fed with natural grass and organic husk.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: Premium quality Black Bengal goat. Known for its excellent meat quality and organic diet.

description: Massive hybrid cow with high muscle mass. Perfect for a grand Qurbani celebration.

name: Red Chittagong Bull
description: The famous Red Chittagong breed. Very active, healthy, and traditionally preferred.

name: Brahman Cross Bull
description: Gigantic Brahman cross bull. Raised in a controlled environment with premium nutrition.

description: Compact and healthy Garole sheep. An affordable and traditional choice for sacrifice.

name: Sindhi Cow
description: Authentic Red Sindhi cow. High disease resistance and excellent body structure.

name: Beetal Goat

name: Mundi Sheep
